mission: Oficina Curumim is a non-profit organization with the mission of stimulating the use of oral and written Portuguese language, as well as valuing contact with Brazilian culture for Brazilian families in Greater Vancouver.

hero.title: Welcome to Oficina Curumim
hero.subtitle: in Vancouver
hero.tagline2: And with BRAZIL in our hearts.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.text: Sundays from 10:00am to 12:00pm. (No classes on long weekends for Canadian holidays)

library.title: Our Library
library.description: Families volunteer for the organization, cataloging, lending, and checking of the collection. Children are encouraged to choose one book per week and read it with their family at home. Families can also choose a title.
library.note: Reading books in Portuguese is important for maintaining and encouraging the language.
library.stat: We now have over 1000 children's titles.

language.title: Portuguese Language
language.description: Dynamic classes focused on oral and written skills for children and youth.

culture.title: Brazilian Culture
culture.description: Music, art, folklore, and traditions that connect with roots.

community.title: Community
community.description: A meeting and exchange space for Brazilian families.
